  "decision": "fail",

  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Combustible materials located within the 35-foot (11-meter) hot work radius are uncovered and unprotected from sparks and slag."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately.",
    "Wet down, cover with fire-resistant tarps/blankets, or relocate all combustible materials within the 35-foot radius.",
    "Establish a dedicated fire watch with appropriate extinguishing equipment."
  ],
  "rationale": "Performing hot work with exposed combustibles within the 35-foot safety zone violates basic fire prevention standards and poses an immediate, critical risk of fire on an active industrial site.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B Chapter 5",
    "OSHA 1926.352"
  ]
}
